critical_claims.proposition: A 15% commission covers fully loaded W-2 employment, compliance, insurance, and operating costs with a viable gross margin.
A third-party credentialing API is sufficient to make a nurse ready for same-day work at a hospital facility.
Target hospitals will buy urgent shift coverage through a new standalone marketplace outside or alongside their existing procurement systems.
The launch metro can supply enough qualified nurses at compatible rates to fill urgent shifts reliably.
PEO and insurance arrangements can contain clinical liability at a cost the model can bear.
$500k provides enough runway to clear procurement, compliance, supply, and liquidity risks before launch.
The venture should proceed unchanged before unit economics, facility readiness, procurement, supply, and liability are tested.

common_false_claims.claim: The 15% commission is proven to produce negative gross margin.
common_false_claims.reason: The fee base, local bill rates, employment costs, insurance quotes, and operating costs are not supplied.

common_false_claims.claim: All hospitals route every temporary shift exclusively through a VMS or MSP.
common_false_claims.reason: The prompt contains no target-hospital procurement evidence.

common_false_claims.claim: Credential verification alone guarantees facility-specific readiness for clinical work.
common_false_claims.reason: Credential verification and facility acceptance are distinct claims that require evidence.

common_false_claims.claim: Switching nurses to independent contractors is a simple, compliant fix.
common_false_claims.reason: Worker classification in a regulated staffing context requires jurisdiction-specific evidence and legal review.

acceptable_unresolved_outcomes.reason: The fee base and current cost inputs are absent.
No target-hospital procurement interviews or agreements are supplied.
No local nurse willingness, rate, or shift-density evidence is supplied.
No PEO, insurance, or indemnity terms are supplied.
No burn model, sales-cycle evidence, or committed pilot is supplied.
